scripts.latency:tail: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force logs | Out-Null; if (!(Test-Path logs/latency.log)) { New-Item -ItemType File logs/latency.log | Out-Null }; Get-Content logs/latency.log -Wait"
scripts.latency:clear: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force logs | Out-Null; Clear-Content logs/latency.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
